backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management and booking request system with role-based access control (admin/user permissions), pagination for requests, and random ID generation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: logo removal from header, WhatsApp booking integration with phone +91 9119960204, and contact number updates across multiple sections.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, hooks, and configuration with emphasis on WhatsApp integration, brand constant updates, and venue name changes to 'Avsarvatika marriage hall'.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes using warm champagne/gold palette, including sidebar, chart, and UI component color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card metadata featuring 'Avsarvatika marriage hall' branding and generated favicon/OG image assets.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing view modes (public/admin), authentication state, profile setup dialog, package selection, and rendering all page sections with conditional admin panel display.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminReque: Admin dashboard view for paginated booking requests with details (name, phone, email, date, package) and navigation controls; displays loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button component using Internet Identity that handles login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts authenticated users to enter their name for profile setup; prevents closing until completed.
frontend/src/components/BookingRequestFo: Booking form component with validation, TypeScript types for BookingRequestInput, BigInt handling for guest count, and mutation integration for submitting requests to backend.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutSe: About section showcasing venue features (Excellence, Personalized Service, Trusted Venue, Premium Quality) with icons and descriptions in a grid layout.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Contact section displaying venue contact information (phone, email, address, hours), WhatsApp chat button, and embedded booking request form with optional pre-selected package.
frontend/src/components/sections/Facilit: Facilities section displaying four categories (Venue Features, Amenities, Services, Outdoor Spaces) with checkmarked lists in card components.
frontend/src/components/sections/Gallery: Gallery component with category filtering and lightbox modal for viewing venue images. Displays stage, venue, entrance, and dining photos in a responsive grid with navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Hero section component featuring brand name, tagline, venue highlights (capacity, parking, AC, catering, décor, booking), and CTA buttons for WhatsApp booking and gallery navigation.
frontend/src/components/sections/Package: Displays three pricing tiers (Classic, Premium, Luxury) with features, pricing, and WhatsApp inquiry buttons. Accepts onPackageSelect callback for package selection handling.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Testimonials section displaying six customer reviews with ratings, event types, and avatars in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer component displaying brand info, contact details with icons, quick navigation links, copyright notice, and a Caffeine.ai attribution link with app identifier.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky header component with brand name, desktop navigation menu, and mobile sheet menu for smooth scrolling to page sections.
frontend/src/constants/brand.ts: Exports brand constants including name, tagline, contact information (phone, WhatsApp, email), and address for the marriage hall.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, handling anonymous and authenticated states with automatic query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend operations including user profile management, admin checks, booking request submission, and paginated booking requests retrieval.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm champagne/ivory color palette for light and dark modes, including primary gold/bronze colors, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH color system, container settings, border radius variables, elegant shadows, custom fonts (Inter, Playfair Display), and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking marriage hall website features including completed WhatsApp booking integration (+91 9119960204), logo removal, and pending feature requests.
